channel.title: CLI Agents
channel.description: Practical notes from using command-line AI agents in real engineering work.

item.title: Crush review
item.description: Review of Crush, a command-line AI coding agent.

item.description: Review of Amp, a command-line AI coding agent.

item.title: Antigravity review
item.description: Review of Antigravity, a command-line AI coding agent.

item.title: OpenCode review
item.description: Review of OpenCode, an open-source command-line AI coding agent.

item.title: Qwen Code review
item.description: Review of Qwen Code, Alibaba Cloud's command-line AI coding agent.

item.title: Roo Code review
item.description: Review of Roo Code, the AI coding assistant.

item.title: Cline review
item.description: Review of Cline, the AI coding assistant for VS Code.

item.title: Gemini CLI review
item.description: Review of Gemini CLI, Google's command-line AI coding agent.

item.title: Goose review
item.description: Review of Goose, the open-source AI agent by Block.

item.title: OpenHands review
item.description: Review of OpenHands, the open-source AI coding agent platform.

item.title: Codex review
item.description: Review of Codex, the AI CLI tool by Cursor and OpenAI.

item.title: Continue review
item.description: Review of Continue, the open-source AI code assistant.

item.title: Warp review
item.description: Review of Warp, the modern terminal with AI features.

item.title: Aider review
item.description: Review of Aider, the open-source command-line AI coding assistant.

item.title: Cursor review
item.description: Review of Cursor, the AI-first code editor with CLI capabilities.

item.title: Claude Code review
item.description: Review of Claude Code, Anthropic's command-line AI coding agent.

item.title: Site launch
item.description: Launch of CLI Agents: practical notes from using command-line AI agents in real engineering work.
